labels: 'reship'

---

**Instructions:**
Do not modify the JSON structure below. Only fill in the values between the quotes. Leave optional fields as empty strings `""`.

```json
{
  "Name": "",
  "Email": "",
  "Lineitem name": "",
  "Shipping Name": "",
  "Shipping Street": "",
  "Shipping Address1": "",
  "Shipping Address2": "",
  "Shipping Company": "",
  "Shipping City": "",
  "Shipping Zip": "",
  "Shipping Province": "",
  "Shipping Country": "",
  "Shipping Phone": ""
}
```
